landing.subtitle: Modern Academic Information System equipped with offline-first CBT, interactive LMS, 24/7 AI Tutor, and automated AI grading.

landing.feature3_desc: Automated KHS calculation and instant AI essay correction.
landing.feature4_desc: Smart assistant for students to discuss and understand materials anytime.
landing.footer: SIAKAD DKN - Integrated Academic Information System
